name: Hot and Spicy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate for 15-20 minutes in a mixture of shredded ginger, sherry, and light soy sauce.
2. Chop scallion and hot peppers diagonally into 1-inch pieces. Grind anise pepper to powder.
3. Mix together chicken broth, light soy sauce, wine vinegar, sugar, salt, and ground anise pepper in a separate bowl.
4. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add scallion and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until slightly crispy.
6. Add ginger, sherry, and the chicken marinade to the scallion mixture and stir-fry for another 1-2 minutes.
7. Pour in the chicken broth mixture and combine well.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the chicken pieces are tender, about 10-15 minutes.
9. Stir in cornstarch to thicken the sauce, if desired.
10. Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
